_comment: Copy this file to model.config.json and edit to match your model. Never commit model.config.json.
_status: TEMPLATE ONLY — Not parsed by any code yet. See TODO.md Phase 1.4.
_chat_template_note: Check the model card on HuggingFace to determine which template to use.
_context_length_note: Must not exceed the model's maximum context. Common values: 4096, 8192, 32768, 131072.
_n_gpu_layers_note: Number of transformer layers to offload to GPU. 0 = CPU only. -1 = all layers.

generation._seed_note: -1 means random seed. Set a fixed integer for reproducible outputs.
